task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Bookmark Manager** (Level 4)

Build a CRUD API for bookmarks. Each bookmark has: url (required, must be a URL), title (required), tags (text). POST /api/bookmarks creates, GET /api/bookmarks lists all, DELETE /api/bookmarks/:id removes. Validate that url is actually a URL format.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Bookmarks table:
  url, required
  title, required
  tags

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Bookmarks table:
  url, required
  title, required
  tags

when user sends bookmark_data to /api/bookmarks:
  validate bookmark_data:
    url is text, required, matches url
    title is text, required
  saved = save bookmark_data to Bookmarks
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/bookmarks:
  bookmarks = get all Bookmarks
  send back bookmarks

when user calls DELETE /api/bookmarks/:id:
  delete Bookmark with this id
  send back 'ok'

test 'POST with valid URL returns 201':
  call POST /api/bookmarks with {url: 'https://example.com', title: 'Example'}
  expect response status 201
  expect response body has 'id'
  expect response body has 'url'
  expect response body has 'title'

test 'POST with invalid URL returns 400':
  call POST /api/bookmarks with {url: 'not-a-url', title: 'Bad'}
  expect response status 400

test 'GET returns all bookmarks':
  call GET /api/bookmarks
  expect response status 200
  expect response body length is greater than 0

test 'POST without URL returns 400':
  call POST /api/bookmarks with {title: 'No URL'}
  expect response status 400
